title: Steamed Salmon with Savory Miso Sauce
description: A simple yet flavorful Japanese-inspired dish featuring steamed salmon fillets served with a savory miso sauce.

ingredients.name: Sake (Japanese rice wine)
ingredients.notes: Dry sake or substitute with dry white wine

ingredients.name: Green onions
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced green onions for garnish

ingredients.name: Ginger
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced fresh ginger for garnish

instructions: Rinse the salmon fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a small saucepan, whisk together the miso paste, soy sauce, sake, and sugar over low heat.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Place the salmon fillets in a steamer basket and steam over boiling water for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
To serve, place the steamed salmon on a plate and spoon the savory miso sauce over the top.
Garnish with thinly sliced green onions and ginger.
